info.title: Demo Service API
info.description: This API exposes endpoints to manage demo.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Authentication and registration endpoints - No authentication required

tags.name: Medication Management
tags.description: Medication management endpoints for health tracking

get.description: Retrieve the profile of the currently authenticated user

put.description: Update profile information for the currently authenticated user. Phone number cannot be updated. Send as JSON.

400.description: Invalid input data or user not found

get.description: Retrieve a specific medication by its ID

put.description: Update details of an existing medication

delete.description: Remove a medication from the user's medication list (with confirmation)

post.description: Upload a new profile image for the currently authenticated user

500.description: Internal server error - File upload failed

400.description: No file provided or invalid file

post.description: Update the Firebase Cloud Messaging token for the current user to receive notifications

get.description: Retrieve all active medications for the currently authenticated user

post.description: Add a new medication to the current user's medication list

Record that medication has been consumed at one of the scheduled times. Decrements remaining quantity by dosageAmount and records timestamp. When remaining quantity reaches 0, medication is marked as completed.

400.description: Invalid state - medication expired, not started, or insufficient remaining quantity

post.description: Create a new user account with phone number, username, password

409.description: Conflict - Username or phone number already exists

400.description: Invalid input - Username format invalid or user error

post.description: Authenticate user with username and password to receive JWT token for subsequent authenticated requests

get.description: Retrieve profile information for a specific user by their ID
Retrieve all consumption records for a specific medication, ordered by most recent first
View a file or play audio inline without downloading
Download a file by its filename
